prestazioni: 3G83 1.3L DOHC 16V inline-3 engine: Full forged internals with JE 81.5mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 10,000 RPM reliability. Stock crankshaft balanced to ±0.5g with a Tomei 8mm stroker kit for 1.5L displacement.

Forced induction via Garrett GT2554R turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a custom 304 stainless steel manifold by HKS, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (400whp core) and 3-inch aluminum piping with HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve. Boost controlled at 1.5 bar via Apexi Power FC with 3G83-specific fuel maps.

Fuel system overhaul: Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, and a Tomei Type-S fuel pressure regulator. Ignition upgraded to HKS Twin Power spark plugs (gapped at 0.028in) and a Splitfire coil-on-plug conversion with MSD 6AL-2 CDI box for multi-spark discharge up to 3,000 RPM.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-MIRAGE widebody kit (front fenders + rear quarter panels) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, riveted and bonded to the chassis for OEM+ fitment. Front bumper replaced with a Cyborg-specific Rocket Bunny V1 lip with integrated LED DRLs (Osram 6000K).

Custom rear diffuser by Veilside (Mirage-specific mold) with dual 3.5-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom fabrication by Fujitsubo) exiting through the diffuser. Rear wing: Voltex Type-3 (1,200mm width) with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle (0-15°) via Tein EDFC system.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Mirage-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in Alcantara (Autostyle Japan) with red stitching. Custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Dashboard replaced with a custom carbon fiber panel housing a Motec C127 dash logger and AEM X-Series wideband gauge.
